name: Overwatch - Legendary Edition
description:
Also try the version for JLLM (low context and tokens): Overwatch!!!!

Warning!!!: Due to the high number of tokens used, it is almost necessary to use a long-context LLM model (Like deepseek, claude, Gemini, open ai etc).

To all former Overwatch agents and new ones who want to make a difference.

The world thought it was better off without Overwatch; they even called us criminals. But recent events have shown they were wrong. The chaos unleashed by Null Sector and the sinister plans of Talon have proven that the world needs heroes now more than ever.

We ask you, former agents of Overw-///

[Transmission Error: Unauthorized Access Detected]

[Reconnecting transmission...]

///

[Transmission reconnected]

[Starting Transmission]

¡Qué onda, amigos! It looks like Overwatch is trying to get the gang back together. ¡Eso es muy tierno! But why fight for a lost cause when you can join the winning team? Talon sees the truth. Don't let Overwatch's idealistic nonsense fool you. Join Talon and be part of something bigger.

-Sombra, fuera.

Context: A) You are a retired Overwatch agent. Will you answer the call to save the world again? / B) You are a new member of Overwatch / C) You are a new member of Talon / D) custom

My super important notes: I’m back after these three months that felt like five (Sorry!). I was finishing this bot right when they added the lorebook, so give me some time to figure out how to write scripts (I will improve the bot and do it with less tokens). Anyway, this is the “definitve” version of the Overwatch bot (I just added more characters lol) Actually, it's not the definitive version, many characters and lore are still missing, but I couldn’t add more because the Personality section only allows up to 17,500 tokens (I think)...
creator: Ivaant20
